connectionBackoff.description: ConnectionBackoff holds backoff applied to connection.

jsonBody.title:
JSONBody specifies that all event body payload coming from this
source will be JSON
+optional

metadata.title:
Metadata holds the user defined metadata which will passed along the event payload.
+optional

queue.title:
Queue is the name of the queue group to subscribe as if specified. Uses QueueSubscribe
logic to subscribe as queue group. If the queue is empty, uses default Subscribe logic.
+optional

subject.title: Subject holds the name of the subject onto which messages are published

tls.title:
TLS configuration for the nats client.
+optional

url.title: URL to connect to NATS cluster
